branches.pageDesc: Manage tenant branches and geofence radius.
branches.emptyDesc: Create the first branch and define its attendance geofence.
branches.desc: Set branch identity, company ownership, location coordinates, and geofence behavior.
branches.companyRequired: Please select a company before saving the branch.
branches.locationSearchError: Could not search this location. Try again.
branches.locationHint: Search for a place or click the map to update latitude and longitude.
branches.locationUnsupported: Your browser does not support location detection.
branches.locationPermissionError: Could not get your current location. Check browser location permissions.
branches.deleteMessage: Employees assigned to this branch may lose a valid attendance location. This action cannot be undone.
branches.addressRequired: Branch address is required. Search for a location, use your current location, or type the address manually.
branches.validationFailed: Please complete the required branch details
branches.saveErrorDesc: Could not save the branch. Review the highlighted fields and try again.
